creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
I updated previous patch:
- updated checksum for EFL ports
- ecore-con and ecore-ipc can use openssl from system, not only from port
- eina and eet is build with -enable-amalgamation


Patch is available in the same place:
http://files.roorback.net/e17/2011-01-29/e17-20110129.diff
old on: http://files.roorback.net/e17/2011-01-29/e17-20110129.diff.old
